name: coqpi
description: Personal communication cockpit for interviews and professional calls.

scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.test:governance: pnpm build:electron && node --test tests/governance.test.cjs tests/context-source-manifest.test.cjs tests/context-source-dump-manifest.test.cjs tests/knowledge-ingestion-quality.test.cjs tests/knowledge-pack-review.test.cjs tests/session-payload-inspector.test.cjs tests/assistant-retry-policy.test.cjs tests/counterparty-pack-import.test.cjs tests/counterparty-pack-import-flow.test.cjs tests/counterparty-pack-ingest-api.test.cjs tests/finder-preview-ui-state.test.cjs tests/finder-search-module.test.cjs tests/finder-search-service.test.cjs
scripts.test:finder-ui-state: pnpm build:electron && node --test tests/finder-preview-ui-state.test.cjs tests/finder-search-module.test.cjs tests/finder-search-service.test.cjs
scripts.test:pre-smoke: pnpm build:electron && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/mock-transcript-scenarios.test.cjs tests/smoke-checklist.test.cjs tests/smoke-readiness-pack.test.cjs tests/pre-test-reset.test.cjs tests/smoke-note-service.test.cjs tests/smoke-fix-queue.test.cjs tests/smoke-report.test.cjs tests/context-pack-quality.test.cjs tests/knowledge-ingestion-quality.test.cjs tests/knowledge-pack-review.test.cjs tests/session-payload-inspector.test.cjs tests/manual-prep-preview.test.cjs tests/session-pack-selection.test.cjs tests/live-loop-ui.test.cjs tests/analyze-recent-transcript.test.cjs tests/assistant-output-quality.test.cjs
